## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX directors to discuss key accounts, organizational changes, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CMs will now report directly to Panzer for improved quality control and people management](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [New framework introduced for categorizing roles: input calibrators, production refiners, and process architects](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Ambit and Aftershoot identified as priority accounts for rescue efforts](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [QBR process to be standardized and implemented across key accounts](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)

## Topics

### Organizational Structure Changes

  - [CMs now report directly to Panzer for better quality control and feedback loop](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [MEs not intended to be people managers; focus on automation and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Long-term vision: CMs may become pooled resources across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### New Role Framework

  - [Three key roles identified: input calibrators, production refiners, and process architects](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Emphasis on excelling in at least one area rather than being mediocre in all](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Goal: Ensure human intervention adds significant value beyond LLM capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Ambit Account Strategy

  - [Rebuilt artifacts to improve technical quality and jargon accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Exploring integration of knowledge-based fact checker from Biologica project](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Demonstrating improvements by comparing old vs. new article versions](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Aftershoot Account Challenges

  - [Client is price-sensitive and resistant to experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Multiple stakeholders with conflicting rules and perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [Recommendation: Provide written summary of discussions to push for decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)

### Upsell Opportunities

  - [WebStacks: Schedule deep dive and strategy refresh in July](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2417.0)
  - [Galileo: Renewal in October, potential upsell identified](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Ramp: Verbal agreement to increase contract value, pending procurement](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2555.0)

### QBR Process

  - [Identified need for standardized QBR template and process](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Key accounts for immediate QBRs: Tiro, Ambit, and Rapid](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jacob to schedule deep dive with WebStacks for July](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2417.0)
  - [Mara to connect with Kyle regarding Galileo upsell opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Directors to submit Linear tickets for ENG ops cycle priorities](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
  - [Jason and Andi to collaborate on standardizing QBR template](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Continue daily director syncs to address ongoing issues and changes](https://fathom.video/share/wDedgn3HCg9JAo5qS-xYBC9zUxNQocgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2850.0)
